creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please check, the port does not build cleanly, some files are missing
from pkg-plist:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: include/open%%AFSMNTDIR%%/%%AFSMNTDIR%%/%%AFSMNTDIR%%_trace.h
Error: Orphaned: sbin/volscan

and some files are not stripped. (tested with make check-plist).
